title: Info Source: Additional Information - Canada.ca
content:
## Info Source: Additional Information
Please see the Introduction to this publication for information on access procedures under the provisions of the Access to Information Act and the Privacy Act .
Please visit the Access to Information and Privacy page for more information on how to file a request under the Access to Information Act or Privacy Act .
The Government of Canada encourages the release of information through informal requests. You may wish to consult Citizenship and Immigration Canada’s completed Access to Information summaries , Privacy Impact Assessment summaries and open data .
In accordance with the Access to Information Act and Privacy Act , the applicant may wish to review material on site at the Access to Information and Privacy Division .
